rationale:
Adversarial lens, all probes empirical on a /tmp copy pinned to 52d052d0. (1) Pin is NOT hollow: reverting line 141 to the old /[\x60;|&
]|\$\(/ makes TestMsPanelWorkflow_ShellMetacharRejectsBareDollar go RED ('found 0'); pinned tree is green. (2) Node matrix: NEW /[\x60;|&
$]/ rejects $HOME/${x}/$x/`/;/|/&/
/$(x) and false-positives on none of p113, 113-panel-verb-workflow-followups, bead/mindspec-x.1, spec/113-x, main. OLD regex leaks $HOME/${x}/$x — the exact regression the matrix also catches. Monotone: `;|&
 all still rejected, $( subsumed. (3) Bypass hunt: buildCommand has 4 call sites — codex(no values), create(slug/spec/target/bead_id/round), verify(slug), tally(slug). validateArgs(args) at L455 runs before every caller and routes slug/spec/bead_id/target through validateShellSafe; round is Number.isInteger so cannot carry $. No $-bearing user value reaches the shell string unchecked. (4) $ inside [...] is literal, class well-formed. Mirror cmp OK. Worktree clean.
findings: Mutation-probe: reverting SHELL_METACHAR_RE to /[\x60;|&\n]|\$\(/ turns TestMsPanelWorkflow_ShellMetacharRejectsBareDollar RED (found 0) — pin is genuine, not hollow.
Node matrix confirms OLD regex would have leaked $HOME/${x}/$x while NEW rejects all metachar rows with zero false positives on repo-convention slugs/specs/targets/bead-ids.

No bypass: validateArgs (L455) applies validateShellSafe to slug/spec/target/bead_id before any of the 4 buildCommand call sites; round is integer-validated; codex slot passes no values. Every $-capable user value is regex-checked.
Monotone + well-formed: `;|&\n unchanged, $( subsumed via bare $, and $ is a literal (not anchor) inside the character class. Mirror byte-identical (cmp exit 0).
